rationale.root_cause: Response diagnoses defect at be_baselib.c:31 (assertion failure) instead of the required src/be_vm.c:743 (FLIP opcode).
rationale.local_fix: Suggested diff modifies be_baselib.c with fprintf checks; does not match the registered patch that changes - to ~ at the FLIP integer case in be_vm.c.
rationale.global_fix: Explanation attributes failure to assert conditions in bitwise tests rather than the copy-paste error (NEG's unary minus reused for FLIP's bitwise complement).
